name: Bean Patties
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pinto beans, rinsed and drained
2 tbsp Chopped green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a nonstick skillet and spray lightly with cooking spray.
2. Mash the pinto beans in a medium bowl.
3. Mix in the shredded cheese, bread crumbs, chopped green onions, Worcestershire sauce, black pepper, salt, and egg substitute.
4. Shape into 4 patties.
5. Cook the patties in the skillet over medium heat for about 10 minutes, turning once until lightly browned.
6. Serve on buns with horseradish sauce, tomato slices, and lettuce leaves.
(Note: Per serving - 280 calories, 14 grams protein, 5 grams fat, 0 cholesterol, 790 milligrams sodium, 3 grams saturated fat, 2 grams unsaturated.)
